findings.message: metadata.version is "1.0.0" but plugins[0].version and plugin.json are both "4.1.0"; outer metadata version was not updated when plugin advanced from v1 to v4
marketplace.json metadata.version "1.0.0" diverges from plugin.json version "4.1.0"; version fields across manifests are out of sync
"comprehensive Playwright API documentation" — 'comprehensive' is a subjective adjective with no measurable criteria, borderline R01 vague quantifier
'writes clean test scripts to /tmp' in description — 'clean' is subjective with no measurable criteria
"playwright": "^1.57.0" allows automatic minor-version updates; a supply-chain compromise in a minor playwright release would silently propagate to all installs
